record.summary: The authentication core, re-based from template-encore apps/api onto enrahitu's own substrate: stateless RS256 JWT access tokens in httpOnly cookies, rotated DB-backed refresh tokens, CSRF double-submit, roles, and audit records on CoreLedger; login rate limiting on hiqlite counters. Drivers are pluggable: mock (dev) here, rauthy OIDC in spec 005 (which owns backend/auth/rauthy.ts inside this spec's directory claim).
record.title: Auth service on CoreLedger + hiqlite rate limiting
